ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the organization or individual owning the station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* List of sensor types installed at the station */,
  "data_retention_policy" TEXT /* Data retention policy for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the alert is issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "issue_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was issued */,
  "expire_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert expires */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the alert */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to take in response to the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_time" INTEGER /* ID of the observation time being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "lead_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead agency */,
  "participant_ids" TEXT /* List of participant agency IDs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "output" TEXT /* Expected output or deliverables of the project */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_lead_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_agency_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_participant_ids FOREIGN KEY ("participant_ids") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
